RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0024 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Carlos Nguyen Date of Birth: 05/02/1971 SSN (tokenized): TKN-555578 Annual Income: $154,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $42,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN39592AL Nissan Sportage 2024 Hybrid CPO 28,000 VIN51776AL Ford 320i 2016 ICE CPO 44,000 Authorized Signature: Carlos Nguyen
